landing.heroBody: An AI-powered investigation desk for claims, sources, and narratives. Paste any article, forward, or transcript — receive a structured credibility dossier built for analysts, journalists, and decision-makers.
landing.sampleBody: A classified-style credibility report — trust score, claims, bias, and evidence.
landing.accessBody: Sign in to run full analyses, archive case files, export PDF dossiers, and collaborate with your team.
landing.accessFoot: Private archive · PDF export · Mesh-powered analysis
landing.stepSubmitDesc: Paste text, upload files, or share a link.
landing.stepInvestigateDesc: Veritas AI extracts claims and gathers evidence.
landing.stepAnalyzeDesc: Evaluate credibility, detect bias, and identify fallacies.
landing.diffTitle: Veritas AI vs other AI chatbots
landing.diffBody: Chatbots help you talk. Veritas helps you verify.
landing.diffOutputChat: A paragraph you have to trust
landing.featuresTitle: Built for those who seek the truth.
landing.boardSourceTitle: Markets rebound as jobs data beats forecasts
landing.boardClaimQuote: “Unemployment fell to a historic low overnight.”
landing.boardHeraldBody: Officials urge caution as viral claims spread overnight…

dashboard.title: Open a new case
dashboard.body: Submit evidence below. Veritas returns a forensic credibility dossier — claims, bias, fallacies, and a trust verdict.
dashboard.pasteOwn: Or paste your own evidence below
dashboard.batchBody: Queue multiple PDFs for sequential analysis

intake.headline: Headline or label (optional)
intake.contentPlaceholder: Paste the content under investigation — article, thread, transcript, forward…
intake.textPlaceholder: Paste the text you want checked — post, forward, article excerpt…
intake.title: What do you want to verify?
intake.subtitle: Pick one way to submit evidence, then file it for analysis.
intake.youtubeHelp: We'll pull the transcript and check claims in the video.
intake.urlHelp: We'll fetch the page and analyze the article content.
intake.dropImage: Drop a screenshot or meme, or
intake.dropImageHint: PNG, JPG, WebP · max 4 MB · OCR extracts meme/screenshot text
intake.imageTooLarge: Image must be 4 MB or smaller for OCR.
intake.dropPdfHint: Max 10 MB · text-based PDFs work best
intake.forwardTip: Tip: paste the full forward, including any “forwarded many times” chain.

report.deleteConfirm: Delete this case file permanently? This cannot be undone.
report.claimGraphDesc: How claims relate to each other (from model output only)
report.sourceLineageDesc: Live web-search context for claims — supporting links, not primary citations
report.claimTimelineDesc: When claims appeared and were debunked
report.confidenceIntervalHint: Heuristic estimate only — not a statistical confidence interval
report.searchContextNote: These links came from live web search and may support investigation — treat them as context, not verified citations of each claim.

history.title: Your credibility dossiers
history.body: Every report you've run — searchable, private, and tied to your account.
history.tryFilters: Try different filters or run a new analysis.
history.emptyHint: File your first investigation from the workspace.
history.openSample: Open a sample case below or file your first investigation.
history.recentEmptyBody: Submit evidence from the workspace, or open a sample case file to see how a dossier is structured.

graph.title: Knowledge graph
graph.body: How your investigations connect — analyses, claims, sources, and domains from the live graph.
graph.loadFailed: Could not load the knowledge graph.
graph.notConfigured: Neo4j is not configured. Add NEO4J_URI and credentials in the backend environment to enable the graph.
graph.empty: No graph data yet. Run an investigation to populate claims, sources, and domains.
graph.hint: Hover or click a node for details
graph.inspectorEmpty: Select a node to read its full label, verdict, and connections. Center gold nodes are investigations — “unsupported” means that case’s credibility verdict, not a system error.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageHint: Choose the language for the investigation workspace and website.
settings.logoutHint: Sign out of this workspace on this device.
settings.soundHint: Louder desk ambience while analyzing: scanner sweeps, typewriter ticks, radio squelch, and a case-stamp when the dossier is ready.

onboarding.welcomeBody: Verify information before you trust it. We analyze content and produce professional credibility dossiers — not chat responses.
onboarding.intakeBody: Paste articles, URLs, social posts, transcripts, or WhatsApp forwards. Pick a category and evidence type so Veritas calibrates the investigation.
onboarding.submitBody: Choose how to submit — paste text, a web link, YouTube, image, or PDF. Veritas builds a structured dossier with trust scores, claims, bias, and fallacies.
onboarding.archiveBody: Every dossier is saved with a case ID. Access past reports from the sidebar Case files section. Press N to jump back to intake.
